name: the routing table names only open-source tools, with any GPL/LGPL marked invoke-only
command: R="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/kind-to-tool-routing.yaml" ruby -ryaml -e 'd=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ENV["R"]); bad=[]; walk=lambda{|n| case n; when Hash; if n["tool"]||n["bundle"]; lic=n["license"].to_s; bad<<n if n["tool"] && lic.empty?; bad<<n if lic=~/GPL/ && n["invoke_only"]!=true; else; n.each_value{|v| walk.call(v)}; end; when Array; n.each{|v| walk.call(v)}; end}; walk.call(d); if bad.any?; STDERR.puts "bad="+bad.inspect; exit 1; end; STDERR.puts "all-foss-ok"'
